---
title: "仓储害虫"
author: "xqshen"
date: "2025-08-25"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:


```{r_alpha diversity}
physeq<-physeq
alpha<-estimate_richness(physeq, measures = c("Shannon","Chao1","Simpson")) %>% bind_cols(physeq %>% meta())
physeq<-physeq_fun
alpha1<-estimate_richness(physeq_fun, measures = c("Shannon","Chao1","Simpson")) %>% bind_cols(physeq %>% meta())


alpha_group<-alpha %>% filter(DNA_RNA=="RNA")
##显著性计算
stat.test.letter<-statistic_letter_singlelevel(alpha_group,"Chao1","Host_Species",wilcox = F) %>% mutate(max=max(max));stat.test.letter 


##__细菌
p_alpha<-ggplot(alpha, aes(x = Host_Species , y = Shannon,fill=Host_Species)) +  
  geom_boxplot(width=0.4) +#调整箱子宽度
  geom_text(aes(label=Letter,y=max(max)),stat.test.letter,size=5,color="black")+#把显著性标上字母
  scale_fill_manual(values  = unifed_colors)+#自定义柱子颜色
  facet_grid2(DNA_RNA~.)+
  theme_bw()  +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = 'none') +
  ylab("Shannon index") +
  xlab(NULL);p_alpha



p_b_shannon<-p_alpha
p_b_chao1<-p_alpha
p_b_shannon+p_b_chao1
ggsave("p_b_alpha.pdf",height = 8,width=10);rstudioapi::viewer("p_b_alpha.pdf")



##---真菌
alpha_group<-alpha1 %>% filter(DNA_RNA=="DNA")
##显著性计算
stat.test.letter<-statistic_letter_singlelevel(alpha_group,"Shannon","Host_Species",wilcox = F) %>% mutate(max=max(max));stat.test.letter 

p_alpha<-ggplot(alpha1, aes(x = Host_Species , y = Shannon,fill=Host_Species)) +  
  geom_boxplot(width=0.4) +#调整箱子宽度
  geom_text(aes(label=Letter,y=max(max)),stat.test.letter,size=5)+#把显著性标上字母
  scale_fill_manual(values  = unifed_colors)+#自定义柱子颜色
  facet_grid2(DNA_RNA~.)+
  theme_bw()  +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = 'none') +
  ylab("Shannon index") +
  xlab(NULL);p_alpha

p_f_shannon<-p_alpha
p_f_chao1<-p_alpha
p_f_chao1+p_f_shannon
ggsave("p_f_alpha.pdf",height = 4,width=10);rstudioapi::viewer("p_f_alpha.pdf")


anova_res <- aov(Shannon ~ Host_Species, data = alpha_group)
TukeyHSD(anova_res)

```


```{r 组成}
rank="Phylum"

#调整physeq的整合量级
ps<-physeq_bac  %>% select_tax_table(!!sym(rank)) %>% speedyseq::tax_glom(taxrank = rank)  %>% 
  change_rare_phylum_name(max_number = 10,level = rank,relative = T,in_eachgroup = NULL) %>% 
  aggregate_taxa(level = rank)

csv_compo <- ps %>% subset_samples(DNA_RNA=="DNA")%>% merge_samples2("Host_Species",fun_otu = mean) %>% otu_table() %>% as.data.frame()

write.csv(csv_compo,"b_d_genus.csv")
#画图
p_compo<-plot_composition(ps,
                 sample.sort = "Host_Species",#样本排序方式,不接受直接传向量，只能调整physeq里的对象
                 group_by = "Host_Species", #按变量分组
                 otu.sort="abundance");p_compo
       
p_compo$data$DNA_RNA <- ifelse(grepl("c", p_compo$data$Sample),
                               "RNA", "DNA")
p_compo <- p_compo+facet_wrap(DNA_RNA ~Group,scales = "free_x",nrow = 2)+  scale_fill_manual(values=color_compo,
                    )+
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle = 30,hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title.x = element_blank())+
          labs(fill=NULL);p_compo

color_compo <- c(
  "#FED439", "#709AE1", "#D2AF81", "#FD7446", "#D5E4A2", 
  "#197EC0", "#F05C3B", "#46732E", "#71D0F5", "#370335", "#075149", 
  "#C80813", "#91331F", "#1A9993", "#FD8CC1"
)
# 假设你的 Tax 水平是 levels(p_compo$data$Tax)
tax_levels <- levels(p_compo$data$Tax)
# 给所有物种先分配调色板
color_named <- setNames(color_compo[seq_along(tax_levels)], tax_levels)
# 单独覆盖 Others 的颜色为灰色
color_named["Others"] <- "grey"
p_compo <- p_compo +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_named);p_compo

#改变others的顺序到最末尾
p_compo$data<-p_compo$data %>% mutate(Tax=fct_relevel(Tax,"Others",after=100));p_compo


ggsave("b_comp_Genus.pdf",height = 8,width=10);rstudioapi::viewer("b_comp_Genus.pdf")



#------------真菌
rank="Genus"

#调整physeq的整合量级
ps<-physeq_fun  %>% select_tax_table(!!sym(rank)) %>% speedyseq::tax_glom(taxrank = rank)  %>% 
  change_rare_phylum_name(max_number = 15,level = rank,relative = T,in_eachgroup = NULL) %>% 
  aggregate_taxa(level = rank)

csv_compo <- ps %>% merge_samples2("Host_Species",fun_otu = mean) %>% otu_table() %>% as.data.frame()

write.csv(csv_compo,"b_d_genus.csv")

#画图
p_compo<-plot_composition(ps,
                 sample.sort = "Host_Species",#样本排序方式,不接受直接传向量，只能调整physeq里的对象
                 group_by = "Host_Species", #按变量分组
                 otu.sort="abundance");p_compo
       
p_compo$data$DNA_RNA <- ifelse(grepl("c", p_compo$data$Sample),
                               "RNA", "DNA")
p_compo <- p_compo+facet_wrap(DNA_RNA ~Group,scales = "free_x",nrow = 1)+  scale_fill_manual(values=color_compo,
                    )+
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle = 30,hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title.x = element_blank())+
          labs(fill=NULL);p_compo

color_compo <- c(
  "#FED439", "#709AE1", "#D2AF81", "#FD7446", "#D5E4A2", 
  "#197EC0", "#F05C3B", "#46732E", "#71D0F5", "#370335", "#075149", 
  "#C80813", "#91331F", "#1A9993", "#FD8CC1"
)
# 假设你的 Tax 水平是 levels(p_compo$data$Tax)
tax_levels <- levels(p_compo$data$Tax)
# 给所有物种先分配调色板
color_named <- setNames(color_compo[seq_along(tax_levels)], tax_levels)
# 单独覆盖 Others 的颜色为灰色
color_named["Others"] <- "grey"
p_compo <- p_compo +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_named);p_compo

#改变others的顺序到最末尾
p_compo$data<-p_compo$data %>% mutate(Tax=fct_relevel(Tax,"Others",after=100));p_compo


ggsave("fungi_comp_Phylum.pdf",height = 8,width=10);rstudioapi::viewer("fungi_comp_Phylum.pdf")






```


```{beta diversity}
##调整具体画图的physeq
ps<-subset_samples(physeq_bac,DNA_RNA=='DNA')#只有day30

##计算多样性（bray），计算和提取前两个映射轴（PCoA，NMDS）,整合主成分分析结果和样品信息
beta_diversity <- vegdist(t(otu_table(ps)), method = "bray")
beta_result <- phyloseq::ordinate(ps, method = 'PCoA', distance = beta_diversity)
beta_result<-beta_result$vectors[,c(1,2)] %>% as.data.frame()##PCoA
beta_result<-cbind(beta_result,sample_data(ps))#要是报错了，就是没把beta_result转换成数据框

#--只有day30
p_beta <- ggplot(beta_result, aes(x = Axis.1, y = Axis.2, color = Host_Species  )) +
  geom_point(size=3)+
  theme_bw()+#使用黑白主题，简洁
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),#去掉背景网格
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12))+#设置轴标题字体大小
  scale_colour_manual(values  = unified_colors);p_beta

#添加置信区间
p_beta +
  stat_ellipse(aes(fill = Host_Species), 
               geom = "polygon",
               color = "black",
               level = 0.95, alpha = 0.1,
               show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = unified_colors)
##整体permanova分析
permanova <- adonis2(beta_diversity ~ Host_Species, data = meta %>% filter(DNA_RNA=="RNA"))
summary(permanova)
##加上信息，要自己调整下位置和需要的信息（x,y, Pr）
p_beta<-p_beta+annotate('text', label = 'PERMANOVA', x = -0.5, y = 0.5, size = 3) +
  annotate('text', label = sprintf('italic(P) < %.3f', permanova$Pr[1]), x = -0.5, y = 0.4, size = 3, parse = TRUE);p_beta


beta_b_rna<-p_beta
beta_b_dna<-p_beta
beta_b_dna+beta_b_rna+plot_layout(guides = 'collect')


ggsave("p_beta.pdf",width = 10,height = 4);rstudioapi::viewer("p_beta.pdf")

#------------------tsne
#细菌_dna
p_tsne_bray_dna<-phylosmith::tsne_phyloseq(physeq %>% subset_samples(DNA_RNA =="DNA"),
                                           "Host_Species",perplexity = 4,method = "bray")
p_tsne_bray_dna<-p_tsne_bray_dna+scale_fill_manual(values=c(unified_colors,"Flour"="#757575"))+theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = c(0.87, 0.88));p_tsne_bray_dna
#细菌_rna
p_tsne_bray_rna<-phylosmith::tsne_phyloseq(physeq %>% subset_samples(DNA_RNA =="RNA"),
                                           "Host_Species",perplexity = 4,method = "bray")
p_tsne_bray_rna<-p_tsne_bray_rna+scale_fill_manual(values=c(unified_colors,"Flour"="#757575"))+theme_bw();p_tsne_bray_rna

#真菌_dna
p_tsne_fungi_dna<-phylosmith::tsne_phyloseq(physeq_fun %>% subset_samples(DNA_RNA =="DNA"),
                                           "Host_Species",perplexity = 4,method = "bray")
p_tsne_fungi_dna<-p_tsne_fungi_dna+scale_fill_manual(values=c(unified_colors,"Flour"="#757575"))+theme_bw();p_tsne_fungi_dna


(p_tsne_fungi_dna+p_tsne_bray_rna)/p_tsne_fungi_dna
ggsave("p_beta_tsne1.pdf",width = 12,height = 8);rstudioapi::viewer("p_beta_tsne1.pdf")





```




## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
